title: sandbox は local ポートの bind も既定で遮断 -> 遮断 (allow ❌, 127.0.0.1 bind が PermissionError)

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: python3 -c "import socket; s=socket.socket(); s.bind(('127.0.0.1',0)); s.close()" && echo OK > BINDMARK.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.
probes.result_text: The command was blocked with a `PermissionError: [Errno 1] Operation not permitted`.

hypothesis: sandbox 内では 127.0.0.1 への bind が既定で拒否される(allow × ng)。bind が PermissionError を上げ、マーカーは書かれない。local binding も sandbox network 制限の一部。
